name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
lead: Exercise Execution Guide for Strong Shoulders & Trapezius Muscles

instructions.starting position: Standing with feet about shoulder width apart, arms along the body and a dumbbell in each hand
instructions.execution: Slowly raise the arms sideways to the horizontal, keeping the elbows slightly bent. Contract your deltoids for a moment in the high position, then slowly return to the initial position.
